outcome_record.event_name: UFC Fight Night — Middleweight Contender Match

prediction.pre_match_note: UFC contender match. Both made weight cleanly. Predicted winner: wrestling-dominant fighter vs pure striker. Grappling advantage in 5-round format → stamina matters more. Style matchup favours wrestler long-term.

outcome.final_score: Wrestler won by decision Rounds 4-5 control

calibration_flags.notes: 11th athlete_modifier record. Style matchup (wrestling vs striking) in 5-round format correctly predicted. Stamina-based style advantage confirmed. MMA athlete_modifier approaching preliminary recalibration threshold.
